testcase.name: test_product_service_request_creation

failure.message: requests.exceptions.ConnectTimeout: HTTPSConnectionPool(host='people-partner-cloud.preview.emergentagent.com', port=443): Max retries exceeded with url: /api/requests (Caused by ConnectTimeoutError(<HTTPSConnection(host='people-partner-cloud.preview.emergentagent.com', port=443) at 0xf89b8ee96310>, 'Connection to people-partner-cloud.preview.emergentagent.com timed out. (connect timeout=15)'))
